resume_action.description: [2/4] 并行 1 任务 (FULL), 预计 10min: setup_data→GPU[1]

experiment_monitor.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Sibyl Experiment Monitor Daemon (LOCAL)
# Tasks: setup_data
# Poll every 120s, timeout: 30min
# Zero LLM tokens consumed.

MARKER="/tmp/sibyl_ablation-no-revision_dc413776e8_exp_monitor.json"
PROJECT_DIR="/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/current"
ALL_TASKS=(setup_data)
TOTAL=1
start_time=$(date +%s)
PREV_DONE_COUNT=0

# Helper: enqueue a wake event for the main system
_enqueue_wake() {
    local kind="$1" summary="$2" urgency="${3:-high}" requires_main="${4:-false}"
    local ts=$(date +%s%3N)
    local queue="/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/exp/experiment_supervisor_main_wake.jsonl"
    [ -f "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/current/exp/experiment_supervisor_main_wake.jsonl" ] && queue="/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/current/exp/experiment_supervisor_main_wake.jsonl"
    mkdir -p "$(dirname "$queue")"
    printf '%s\n' "{\"event_id\":\"wake-${ts}-monitor\",\"owner_id\":\"monitor_daemon_$$\",\"kind\":\"$kind\",\"summary\":\"$summary\",\"urgency\":\"$urgency\",\"requires_main_system\":$requires_main,\"created_at\":$ts}" \
        >> "$queue"
}

echo '{"status": "monitoring", "total": 1, "completed": [], "pending": ["setup_data"], "dispatch_needed": false}' > "$MARKER"

i=0
while true; do
    i=$((i + 1))
    COMPLETED=""
    COMPLETED_JSON=""
    PENDING=""
    PENDING_JSON=""
    done_count=0

    # ── Local DONE check ──
    for t in setup_data; do
        if [ -f "$PROJECT_DIR/exp/results/${t}_DONE" ]; then
            done_count=$((done_count + 1))
            if [ -z "$COMPLETED" ]; then
                COMPLETED="$t"
                COMPLETED_JSON="\"$t\""
            else
                COMPLETED="$COMPLETED,$t"
                COMPLETED_JSON="$COMPLETED_JSON, \"$t\""
            fi
        else
            if [ -z "$PENDING" ]; then
                PENDING="$t"
                PENDING_JSON="\"$t\""
            else
                PENDING="$PENDING $t"
                PENDING_JSON="$PENDING_JSON, \"$t\""
            fi
        fi
    done

    # Detect newly completed tasks
    DISPATCH="false"
    if [ "$done_count" -gt "$PREV_DONE_COUNT" ]; then
        DISPATCH="true"
    fi
    PREV_DONE_COUNT=$done_count

    # ── Collect PROGRESS snapshots (local) ──
    PROGRESS_JSON=""
    if [ -n "$PENDING" ]; then
        for t in $PENDING; do
            prog=$(cat "$PROJECT_DIR/exp/results/${t}_PROGRESS.json" 2>/dev/null)
            if [ -n "$prog" ]; then
                entry="\"$t\": $prog"
                if [ -z "$PROGRESS_JSON" ]; then
                    PROGRESS_JSON="$entry"
                else
                    PROGRESS_JSON="$PROGRESS_JSON, $entry"
                fi
            fi
        done
    fi

    elapsed=$(( $(date +%s) - start_time ))
    echo "[monitor $i] $done_count/$TOTAL done (elapsed: ${elapsed}s)"

    # ── GPU State Refresh (local nvidia-smi) ──
    GPU_OUTPUT=$(nvidia-smi --query-gpu=index,memory.used,memory.total,utilization.gpu --format=csv,noheader,nounits 2>/dev/null)
    if [ $? -eq 0 ] && [ -n "$GPU_OUTPUT" ]; then
        cd "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem" && "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -m sibyl.cli record-gpu-poll \
            "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision" --nvidia-smi-output "$GPU_OUTPUT" \
            --source "monitor_daemon" > /dev/null 2>&1

        # ── GPU Efficiency Digest (every 3 polls) ──
        if [ $((i % 3)) -eq 0 ]; then
            DIGEST=$("/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -c "
import json, sys
from sibyl.experiment_digest import analyze_gpu_efficiency, format_digest_for_llm, build_digest
gpu_out = sys.argv[1]
task_gpus = json.loads(sys.argv[2])
progress = json.loads(sys.argv[3]) if len(sys.argv) > 3 else {}
analysis = analyze_gpu_efficiency(gpu_out, running_task_gpus=task_gpus)
digest = build_digest(analysis, [], analysis.get('recommendations', []), task_progress=progress, elapsed_min=int(sys.argv[4]) if len(sys.argv) > 4 else 0)
print(json.dumps(digest))
" "$GPU_OUTPUT" '{"setup_data": [1]}' "${PROGRESS_JSON:-{}}" "$(((${elapsed:-0}) / 60))" 2>/dev/null)

            if [ -n "$DIGEST" ]; then
                FREE_COUNT=$(echo "$DIGEST" | "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d.get('gpu_analysis',{}).get('free_gpus',[])))" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
                if [ "$FREE_COUNT" -gt 0 ] && [ "$DISPATCH" != "true" ]; then
                    DISPATCH_RESULT=$(cd "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem" && "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -m sibyl.cli dispatch "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision" 2>/dev/null)
                    PROACTIVE_COUNT=$(echo "$DISPATCH_RESULT" | "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -c \
                        "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d.get('dispatch',[])))" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
                    if [ "$PROACTIVE_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
                        _enqueue_wake "dispatch_ready" "$PROACTIVE_COUNT tasks dispatched to free GPUs" "high" "true"
                    fi
                fi

                UNDERUTIL_COUNT=$(echo "$DIGEST" | "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d.get('gpu_analysis',{}).get('underutilized',[])))" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
                if [ "$UNDERUTIL_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
                    _enqueue_wake "gpu_underutilized" "$UNDERUTIL_COUNT GPUs underutilized" "medium" "false"
                fi

                _enqueue_wake "periodic_review" "Digest available" "low" "false"
            fi
        fi
    fi

    # ── Append to monitor history ──
    echo "{\"ts\": $(date +%s), \"poll\": $i, \"done_count\": $done_count, \"total\": $TOTAL}" >> "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/exp/monitor_history.jsonl" 2>/dev/null

    # ── Dynamic Dispatch (when new tasks completed) ──
    if [ "$DISPATCH" = "true" ]; then
        if [ -n "$COMPLETED_JSON" ]; then
            cd "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem" && "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -m sibyl.cli sync-experiment-completions \
                "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision" --completed-json "[$COMPLETED_JSON]" > /dev/null 2>&1
        fi
        DISPATCH_RESULT=$(cd "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem" && "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -m sibyl.cli dispatch "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision" 2>/dev/null)
        DISPATCH_COUNT=$(echo "$DISPATCH_RESULT" | "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -c \
            "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d.get('dispatch',[])))" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        if [ "$DISPATCH_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
            _enqueue_wake "dispatch_ready" "$DISPATCH_COUNT new tasks dispatched" "high" "true"
        fi
    fi

    # ── Stuck Process Detection (local) ──
    STUCK_TASKS=""
    for task_id in "${ALL_TASKS[@]}"; do
        echo ",$COMPLETED," | grep -q ",$task_id," && continue
        pid_file="/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/current/exp/results/${task_id}.pid"
        if [ -f "$pid_file" ]; then
            pid=$(cat "$pid_file" 2>/dev/null)
            if [ -n "$pid" ]; then
                if ! kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then
                    if [ -z "$STUCK_TASKS" ]; then
                        STUCK_TASKS="$task_id"
                    else
                        STUCK_TASKS="$STUCK_TASKS,$task_id"
                    fi
                fi
            fi
        elif [ ! -f "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/current/exp/results/${task_id}_DONE" ]; then
            # No PID file AND no DONE marker — task likely crashed before writing PID
            if [ -z "$STUCK_TASKS" ]; then
                STUCK_TASKS="$task_id"
            else
                STUCK_TASKS="$STUCK_TASKS,$task_id"
            fi
        fi
    done
    if [ -n "$STUCK_TASKS" ]; then
        _enqueue_wake "task_died" "Process dead without DONE marker: $STUCK_TASKS" "high" "true"
    fi

    # ── Write marker file ──
    if [ "$done_count" -eq "$TOTAL" ]; then
        # Final sync: mark all tasks completed in experiment_state.json
        if [ -n "$COMPLETED_JSON" ]; then
            cd "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem" && "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/.venv/bin/python3" -m sibyl.cli sync-experiment-completions \
                "/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision" --completed-json "[$COMPLETED_JSON]" > /dev/null 2>&1
        fi
        echo '{"status": "all_complete", "completed": ['$COMPLETED_JSON'], "pending": [], "dispatch_needed": false, "progress": {'$PROGRESS_JSON'}, "elapsed_sec": '$elapsed', "poll_count": '$i'}' > "$MARKER"
        echo "[monitor] All 1 tasks complete!"
        [ -n "$(type -t _enqueue_wake 2>/dev/null)" ] && _enqueue_wake "all_complete" "All 1 tasks finished" "high" "true"
        exit 0
    fi

    echo '{"status": "monitoring", "completed": ['$COMPLETED_JSON'], "pending": ['$PENDING_JSON'], "dispatch_needed": '$DISPATCH', "progress": {'$PROGRESS_JSON'}, "elapsed_sec": '$elapsed', "poll_count": '$i'}' > "$MARKER"

    elapsed=$(( $(date +%s) - start_time ))
    if [ "$elapsed" -gt 1800 ]; then
        echo "[monitor] Timeout after 30min"
        echo '{"status": "timeout", "completed": ['$COMPLETED_JSON'], "pending": ['$PENDING_JSON'], "elapsed_sec": '$elapsed'}' > "$MARKER"
        exit 1
    fi
    sleep 120
done

resume_action.execution_script:
## EXECUTION: skill
1. Skill tool: name='sibyl-experimenter', args="/home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/current FULL local /home/qhxie/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/workspaces/ablation-no-revision/current 'conda run -n sibyl_ablation-no-revision' 1 --tasks=setup_data"
2. [Hook auto-starts bash monitor daemon — no action needed]

**On completion**: cli_record(workspace, 'experiment_cycle')
**On error**: log to errors.jsonl, retry up to 3x, then skip+continue

pending_hooks.name: lark_sync
pending_hooks.resume_hint: restart the sibyl-lark-sync background agent before continuing the loop
